summary: Create a Model Manager viewpoint and link it to the issue (REST v2.0)
description:
Proxies to Model Manager `POST /rest/v2.0/companies/{company_id}/projects/{project_id}/bim/viewpoints`
(`RequestsCreateViewpointRequest`: `scene_id`, optional `name`, `payload` per MM OpenAPI), plus
**Procore-required** `bim_model_uuid` for application validation. Then inserts
`coordination_issue_bim_viewpoints` with `viewpoint_uuid` (MM viewpoint id).

Optional observer/notification side effects enqueue `CoordinationIssues::ObserverWorker`.

201.description: Created ŌĆö body matches BIM MM `ViewpointResponseType1` (`data` = `ResponsesViewpointResponse`)

schema.description: BIM MM `ViewpointResponseType1` ŌĆö success responses include `data`; `error` when MM uses error envelope.

data.description:
BIM MM `ResponsesViewpointResponse` (viewpoint resource). Procore may present this under `data` via
`ModelManagerViewpointPresenter` (types should match MM).

payload.description:
Viewpoint payload sent to / returned from Model Manager. Matches BIM MM `TypesViewpointPayload`
(camera, clipping, visibility, snapshot, markup, measurements, etc.).

422.description:
Validation error (e.g. missing `scene_id` / `bim_model_uuid`, invalid payload JSON) or
Model Manager failure wrapped as `render_model_errors`.

schema.description:
BIM MM `RequestsCreateViewpointRequest` fields plus **Procore-only** `bim_model_uuid` (required by
monolith validation; not sent as a top-level field to Model Manager).

When **`payload` is omitted...

bim_model_uuid.description: Required by Procore `ViewpointCreateViaModelManagerService` validation (not sent to MM create as a top-level field).

camera_data.description:
Used when top-level `payload` is absent ŌĆö becomes `camera` in the MM payload. Send a JSON object or a JSON string
(parsed server-side).

redlines_data.description: Used when top-level `payload` is absent ŌĆö becomes `markup` in the MM payload (object or JSON string).

sections_data.description:
Used when top-level `payload` is absent ŌĆö parsed value is set on `clipping.planes` in the MM payload.
Model Manager expects an array of clipping planes (`TypesClippingPlane`); object or JSON string...

bim_file_id.description: Accepted in the JSON body for parity with other viewpoint APIs; **not** applied by MM create in this flow.

bim_view_folder_id.description: Accepted in the JSON body for parity with other viewpoint APIs; **not** applied by MM create in this flow.

snapshot_upload_uuid.description: Accepted in the JSON body; **not** applied by MM create in this flow unless part of `payload`.

primary.description: Sets `is_primary` on the coordination-issue viewpoint mapping.

position.description: Sets ordering `position` on the coordination-issue viewpoint mapping (auto-incremented if omitted).
